spec_match.rationale: Demo exercises the core API surface — every title keyword (based, integrity, signature) and 3 summary keywords appear directly in the page.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface: 8 form controls wired to ~3705 chars of script that mutate the page state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb and lede only share 2 keywords — page substance is close but the framing has drifted from how the feature index sells it.

edge_cases.rationale: Page feature-detects the API and shows both the supported and unsupported branches (try/catch + missing-API messaging).

references.rationale: Page links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5032324620877824 directly in the see-also / references section.

design_system.rationale: All colours flow through CSS variables, no raw hex, and button overrides keep colour and background in sync.

openQuestions.title: Tighten lede / blurb vocabulary alignment
openQuestions.detail: Lede on the concept and blurb on the feature index share only one or two anchor words. Either restate the blurb's promise in the lede, or update the blurb on /v141/signature-based-integrity/ to match what the demo actually shows.

summary: Solid concept page: 5 of 6 rubric criteria pass, no fails. Minor follow-ups left as open questions.
